reviews.review_description:
I was a huge fan of Oculus Medium and I was looking for a similar solution for the quest 3. SculptrVR kinda goes into the right direction but is missing vital functionality to make it a usable for nice sculpting.
Dynamic voxel resolution, missing brush strength, and a UI that is not collapsing are a few aspects that killed the vibe for me. 
Great for playing and having fun but not what I was looking for 👍

I love this app! One of the best on the market. So much room for creativity and exploration. I wish the devs would update to allow for passthrough and multiple sculpture cubes in the passthrough environment. Imagine sculpting little figures or your own furniture to put in your own actual environment. Would be the coolest thing ever. Image having the ability to create interactive items in your own environment and then playing like hide and seek with someone in your room.

The graphics are bad, you only get a limited space to make things, and the controls are confusing and it takes a while to get used to. If you like this style of app, then I definitely recommend Gravity Sketch and Open Brush (on app lab I think) they are both free, and Open Brush has lots of brushes that will keep you entertained for a long while. Gravity Sketch doesn't have that much of a selection of brushes, but it's free none the less. To sum it down, this app is not worth your hard earned time and money and you should not buy it (but it's your money, do what you want with it.)

Ok when I first opened it it looked cool but I tried to actually sculpt I realised the absence of tools. there were some tools like a sphere, cube, cone ect but the most important ones were missing like a grab tool(an absolute essential tool) or any other quality of life tools. The options with the layers were also minimal. I'm getting a refund and so should you(if you already bought it)

I'm a sculptor and this was my first venture from clay into VR. This is a great app. Intuitive and very forgiving. I couldn't see a ruler or some way of comparing proportions easily, which would be useful, but otherwise excellent

I have not got the hang of it yet,a bit confusing,needs like a pen to do really small details.You can be doing something & you let other people join or you join them but end up them being kids & some younger than 13. I really think you need age categories,as one they mess your work up or doing something very babyish & two it's really weird getting young kids talking to adults.

developer_response.body:
Hey debksur, we hear you! We'll be adding a 'lock' ability to multiplayer games soon so you can host private games, and potentially age categories as well. 

Thanks for your patience,

Cheers,

reviews.review_description: This game is super fun, it has a nice selection of tools to use and is very easy to use, the only downside in this game is how whenever you make something with a little bit of high detail or small, it has a hard time rendering your sculpture, other than that this game is amazing
You cannot sculpt fine detail. Not enough tools. I also thought you could walk around and sculpt kind of like tilt brush. A few updates and it would be great.

developer_response.body: Did you discover that you can zoom in by holding both grips at once? You can get pretty detailed :-)

reviews.review_description: Being one of the few cheaper games for the quest, this is a must buy. It may take some time to learn how everything works but once you figure it all out, it takes no time to start making some awesome creations. But one thing I will say is that it does have it's limits. While you can make complex creations within the boundary box, if you try and make something TOO detailed it will go all blocky and low poly which can sometimes make it really hard to add small details.

This game was very amazing and it is so much fun! I would recommend that when you walk in the walking mode, that you can walk on all sides of things without having to reorient yourself like if you were walking on something round and you want it to almost have gravity on it. But the rest of the game is SO COOL! I play it all the time.

reviews.review_title: Hands down the best multiplayer VR game
reviews.review_description:
SculptrVR gives you an unbelievable level of freedom to sculpt anything at any scale. BUT the best part of the game is definitely the multiplayer. 

There's a very large active community using SculptrVR and it's easy to join a lobby anytime.

The best parts of SculptrVR:
- Sculpting is super easy for beginners
- Kids absolutely love this game 
- Tonnes of extra features including multiplayer, hang-gliding, rock climbing, rockets, etc.
- Messing around with friends and strangers in multiplayer

Features I'd love to see improved:
- Improved UI for menu items
- Easier access to inspiration images
- Tutorial

It's an unbelievable game and it's a great showcase for the infinite possibilities for VR.

Highly recommend.

Love all the stuff you can do! I hope they eventually add finer brush details like a pencil carve would be nice. More paint brush styles. Other than that I have a blast playing it. I'm not artistic but I can make a cool ocean wave :) and a town. Haha I like it. Multiplayer is cool. I've found some cool people at times just all collaborating together making stuff. 

Definitely worth it. Kick back. Relax and make some stuff. :]
This game I 200% recommend one of the best games on the quest and they have an amazing customer service team. I cannot recommend you get this game enough. Its awsome just absolutely amazing
There is one problem : I am lefthanded and in some cases I have to swap my controllers . Is there any solution

developer_response.body: yep! go to settings (in the file/settings tab) to switch handedness

reviews.review_description: My only issue is the same one everyone else has... please please add tutorials to this!!! There are people on YouTube giving some awesome advice that you can find but an in game tutorial would be so helpful! Otherwise this is the most incredibly immersive and creative Vr experience!! I could get lost for hours on this one! It is SO much fun!!! Get this you will not regret it!!

reviews.review_title: Love to see creative games in VR
reviews.review_description: Made even better with multiplayer. Would love to see support for a larger play area!

reviews.review_title: Great Way To Speed Up Time
reviews.review_description: When you're having fun time flies, when you're in a VR world focused on creativity and tools/accessibility time goes 5x Faster. Great for when I need to Speed up time 5x. And making 3D printed masks for My kindergarten students. Also great tool to play while in a car in the backseat , as it adds to the level of fear making it a horror game in some regards.  One time I was car playing and accidentally broke my friends nose who was driving on a road trip to LA and we crashed head on with a motorcycle but everyone was okay. We gave the guy a free quest (we had a few with us) and all was well, he had bad head injury and he seemed sort of comatose but its fine, he rode off slowly into the sunset in VR on the i-95. I hope he made it. If he did it was 5x the speed for him, so cool for real. 10 out of 10. 5 out of 5¥6000kjp™

reviews.review_title: Great app to make your child happy
reviews.review_description: My 8years old son loves this app so much. Sometimes he plays this one mroe than 2 hours a day, creating his deam worlds realized in this app. When he first played this app, he said to me "Daddy, is it a deam? I really appreaciate this app develpers for making my child 😊

reviews.review_title: Not for kids- online gallery is awful
reviews.review_description:
They could use some curated content - the online gallery right now is terrible and not for kids.
Worse- the quality in game is bad - their rendering and level of detail calculation engine has some bugs - so things aren’t as you’d expect.

The UI is fun but clunky and seems not to work at times, if they made things more polished, added room scale interaction, but mostly made the online gallery lockable or curated somehow, this would be 3star, fix the detail, 4 star, add more interactions and point lights / ways of modeling 5stars and with 25$

Please fix :/

developer_response.body:
Hey Vitalwin, I'm sorry that you had a bad experience with the gallery!

We absolutely agree with you, and the gallery is now curated, and kid friendly. We've also added tutorial videos and documentation to better explain how to use the various tools, which you can find here: http://sculptrvr.com/start

The Quest/Quest 2's rendering power is limited, and we optimize for a smooth framerate. There is an option to increase the detail rendered, though it will affect framerate. If you want to view all the detail, you can always export your sculpture to FBX. If you there's anything else we can fix, please let us know @ https://www.sculptrvr.com/contact.

reviews.review_title: Cool, worth it, but has bugs
reviews.review_description: My family and I really enjoy this sculpting app! It is worth having it. However we often see a bug while using the initial tool that it starts with (sphere). We often create something with it and it disappear / appear as we walk around it... And sometimes it turns into a square. But hopefully they will fix the bugs and add more features.
